title: EditVillagers Plugin
description: The easiest way to create a Trader in Minecraft!
body:
# EditVillager
A simple and advanced plugin for creating a Trader directly through the graphical menu in the game.
With its help, you will forever forget about command blocks and various sites, now creating a trader is very convenient and simple!

![Торговый Житель](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb357c13af9059f7375379bc5407a5f18695354_0.webp)
## Commands
- /ev create <name> <profession> - Create a new villager  with custom trades
- /ev edit - Open GUI to edit the villager you're looking at 
- /ev name <name> - Set a custom name for a nearby villager
- /ev carry - Pick up or place a nearby villager
- /ev profession <profession> - Change the profession of the villager you're looking at

## Possibilities:
![Possibilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d758c6dc76e2f031cb990b2a81fadcd4827fae5.png)
- You can upgrade a villager
- Change profession and name with different colors (&)
- Move the merchant with your gaze
- Select the villager
- Align to the center of the block
- Make him invulnerable
- Mute sounds
- And much more!

## Review:
(link youtube)

### EditVillagers is not just a tool, but an external assistant in creating a living and dynamic Minecraft world. Add your unique traders today!
